description_long: This is a mid-century modern style filing cabinet with a rectangular form and a warm, medium-brown wood finish. The front features four wide, flat-faced drawers with no visible handles, giving it a minimalist and seamless appearance. The cabinet stands on short, angled black metal legs that elevate it slightly off the ground, adding a touch of contemporary flair. The sides and back are plain, showcasing the consistent wood grain pattern throughout. The overall construction appears sturdy, with clean lines and a smooth surface. This piece would fit well in urban environments such as offices, home workspaces, or modern apartment interiors.
description: A modern, wood-finished filing cabinet with four seamless drawers and black metal legs, featuring a minimalist design and smooth surfaces.
description_view_0: The front view displays four wide, handle-less drawers with a continuous wood grain pattern and black metal legs.
description_view_1: The left side view shows a plain, flat wood panel with visible grain and no additional features.
description_view_2: The back view reveals a solid wood panel with a consistent finish, lacking any openings or hardware.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, with a plain wood panel and no distinguishing features.
